description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image and defines a single pages job in the deploy stage that only runs on the master branch. The job caches the vendor directory, publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact, and executes the exact shell commands: apt-get update -yqqq, apt-get install -y nodejs, bundle install --path vendor, and bundle exec middleman build. It relies on the built‑in GitLab Pages deployment target to serve the generated site. No additional services or variables are required.
